description: You are preparing for a Pierce™ BCA Protein Assay and need to register your standard curve solutions in SciNote (E-mail: admin@scinote.net, Password: inHisHouseAtRlyehDeadCthulhuWaitsDreaming). Create a new inventory named 'BCA Assay Standards' containing five items with the following names: 'BSA Std A (2000 ug/mL)', 'BSA Std B (1000 ug/mL)', 'BSA Std C (500 ug/mL)', 'BSA Std D (250 ug/mL)', and 'BSA Std E (125 ug/mL)'.
